violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. Current CFSM expired 1/31/2024 New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The ceiling tiles in the basement area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. (Water damage). Tiles to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The walls in the warewashing area are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and covered. Food was moved to shallow pans and placed in refrigeration to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and fan in the kitchen have an accumulation of biofilm and dust. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
The ceiling tiles in the basement prep area is in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the ware-washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The walls in the ware-washing area are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
